Gateway external routes — public BC APIs
Gateway internal routes — S2S / BC ↔ BC
Authorizer — the PEP (gateway-embedded or sidecar; JWT validation + authz call)
OPA — Gateway OPA (route PBAC) / Authorization OPA (central PDP; JWT re-validation)
pgauthzd (compat-opa) — the AuthZEN 1.0 PEP front door; consults OPA and serves the native callback (pgx→SQL)
pgauthz — ReBAC decision engine + relationship store
Control plane — versioned policies; audited tuple + model/admin channels
